sn10.2:1.1:
1
On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Rājagaha on Mount Vulture Peak. Then the yakkha Sakkanamaka approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn10.2:1.2:
2
"Having abandoned all the knots
As one fully released,
It isn’t good for you, an ascetic,
To be instructing others."
